summary: Markets heading into Friday with mixed momentum as earnings season continues to drive individual stock volatility. Key catalyst today is NFLX earnings with the stock at historically low valuations, which could provide significant directional moves given the massive 65M share volume. Main risk to watch is second-day fade on yesterday's momentum names, particularly the larger gap-ups that may struggle to hold gains without fresh catalysts.

earnings.game_plan: Watch for gap fill play around $95-96 if it opens weak on sector news

earnings.game_plan: Long over $110 on earnings beat with volume spike, short under $105 on miss
